title: The Central Educational Institutions (Reservation in Teachers Cadre) Act, 2019
full_text: The Central Educational Institutions (Reservation in Teachers Cadre) Act, 2019 केंद्रीय शिक्षा संस्थाू (शिक्षकों के काडर में आरक्षण)अधिनियम, 2019 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201910 Act Number: 10 Enactment Date: 2019-07-09 Act Year: 2019 Short Title: The Central Educational Institutions (Reservation in Teachers Cadre) Act, 2019 Hindi Title: केंद्रीय शिक्षा संस्थाू (शिक्षकों के काडर में आरक्षण)अधिनियम, 2019 Long Title: An Act to provide for the reservation of posts in appointments by direct recruitment of persons belonging to the Scheduled Castes, the Scheduled Tribes, the socially and educationally backward classes and the economically weaker sections, to teachers cadre in certain Central Educational Institutions established, maintained or aided by the Central Government, and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 07-03-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Central Educational Institutions (Reservation in Teachers Cadre) Act, 2019 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement Section 2. Definitions Section 3. Reservation of posts in recruitments by Central Educational Institutions. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Act not to apply in certain cases. Section 5. Laying of notifications before Parliament. Section 6. Repeal and savings.
